title: Loops vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Loops vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Loops and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Loops is built for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Loops wins for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Loops or Mailgun?
faq.a: Mailgun starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Loops?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
